source_jobs.title: Account Executive - Mid-Market
source_jobs.description:
As an Account Executive on the North American Mid-Market team, you are responsible for driving revenue in North America with a focus on the mid-market segment (250 - 5,000 employees). You are committed to learning and executing our proven sales methodologies to hit your quota and grow your sales skills. 
 
From your future coach: “I'm thrilled to lead a group of dynamic professionals who are not only passionate about sales but also dedicated to fostering genuine connections with our clients. Here, we thrive on the pulse of innovation and collaboration, fueling our relentless pursuit of excellence. With a firm belief in work-life balance, transparency, and a culture that embraces challenges, every day presents an opportunity for growth and achievement. So buckle up, because with our team, the journey is just as exhilarating as the destination. Let's rock the world of Mid-Market Sales together!” - Graham Knowles, https://www.linkedin.com/in/knowlesg/

source_jobs.title: Account Executive DACH (m/f/d)
source_jobs.description:
We are looking for an Account Executive who is curious, passionate, who thrives in an international team and is willing to roll-up their sleeves to get things done.
 
As an Account Executive, you will be responsible for driving revenue on German speaking markets, with a focus on the mid-market segment. You are committed to learning and perfectly executing our proven sales methodologies to hit your quota and to actively contribute to the German growth strategy and sales effort. 
 
The position involves leading opportunities from demo to closing, taking an active part in our responses to requests for proposals, growing your network with HR & training decision-makers, and developing the best sales strategies to close deals.

source_jobs.title: Account Executive Mid Market - UK Market
source_jobs.description:
As an Account Executive, you will be responsible for signing new logos within the UK and Scandinavian markets. You will be part of a team of 3 Account Executives who are achieving their ambitious objectives in 2025-2026.
The position involves leading inbound opportunities from demo to closing, taking an active part in our responses to requests for proposals, growing your network with HR & training decision-makers and developing the best sales strategies to close deals.
360 Learning is committed to providing fulfilling career paths; this role will offer you the opportunity to move into other roles within the organization after 2 or 3 years of continuous success.
Hear from our AE Mid Coach 
My core objective for the Mid Market team is to continue to expand our leadership in France. I strive for collaboration, working within a good team dynamic is essential; we only progress if everyone brings their expertise and shares their feedback along the way. Our sales experts have the unique opportunity to grow their careers through our defined career paths and learn how the sales playbook of a market-leading LMS.

source_jobs.title: Account Executive Mid-Market France
source_jobs.description:
As an Account Executive, you will be responsible for signing new logos within the French market. You will be part of a team of 5 Account Executives who are achieving their ambitious objectives in 2026.
 
The position involves leading opportunities from demo to closing, taking an active part in our responses to requests for proposals, growing your network with HR & training decision-makers and developing the best sales strategies to close deals.360 Learning is committed to providing fulfilling career paths; this role will offer you the opportunity to move into other roles within the organization after 2 or 3 years of continuous success.
 
Hear from our AE Mid Coach :
My core objective for the Mid Market team is to continue to expand our leadership in France. I strive for collaboration, working within a good team dynamic is essential; we only progress if everyone brings their expertise and shares their feedback along the way. Our sales experts have the unique opportunity to grow their careers through our defined career paths and learn how the sales playbook of a market-leading LMS.

source_jobs.title: AI Engineer
source_jobs.description:
AI is central to 360Learning's strategy: our AI Squad ships agentic features that help users discover, create, and administrate content. As an AI Engineer, you'll architect and ship the next generation of these AI systems, from prototype to production.
You will join the AI Squad as its second AI Engineer, working closely with 1 peer AI Engineer, 1 Product Manager, 1 Product Designer, and 4 Full-Stack Developers. You will own the technical strategy for AI features while collaborating directly with product, design, and engineering.
Over the last year, we have shipped 5+ AI features powering thousands of users monthly:
Catalog Companion: An AI agent performing bulk catalog operations (sharing, archiving, tagging, author assignments)
Smart Search: conversational search helping users discover the right content
Conversational BI: Analytics and insights delivered through natural conversation
AI Course & Question Generation: Creating questions and full courses from documents and titles
Content Recommendations: Personalized content discovery
Our squad is unique because we operate in one of the fastest-moving fields in tech: AI!

source_jobs.title: Business Development Representative
source_jobs.description:
360Learning is looking for a Business Development Representative (BDR) to join our French mid-market team. Your role will consist of generating opportunities from 360Learning top priority, highest potential accounts. As the owner of these accounts, you will be in charge of developing personalized outreach strategies to connect with target personas and transform intent signals into a sales pipeline.
 
More specifically, you will be in charge of your territory to create and qualify cold outbound leads and contact potential customers through cold-calls, email, and LinkedIn. Throughout your conversations, you will detect customer pain points, understand their context, and how we can help. You will evangelize collaborative learning in the market, and pitch the 360Learning value proposition.
 
Working in close collaboration with your coach, marketing operations, demand generation, and sales, you will benefit from thorough onboarding and continuous learning & coaching opportunities as you grow.

source_jobs.title: Business Development Representative DACH
source_jobs.description:
360Learning is looking for a Business Development Representative (BDR) to join our DACH team. Your role will consist of generating opportunities from 360Learning top priority, highest potential accounts. As the owner of these accounts, you will be in charge of creating business opportunities for DACH Account Executives through inbound and outbound leads qualification. You will leverage bleeding-edge Sales Development Techniques & tools to engage prospects. 
 
This position will play a key role in building a strong sales pipeline. More specifically, you will be in charge of your territory to qualify inbound and outbound leads and pitch our product to interested prospects. Throughout your conversations, you will detect customer pain points, understand their context, and how we can help. You will evangelize collaborative learning in the market, and present the 360Learning value proposition.

source_jobs.title: Client Success Partner - Enterprise
source_jobs.description:
As a Client Success Partner (CSP) within the Enterprise team, you will support our largest clients in their digital training strategy through the 360Learning platform. 
 
Your mission is to build a strong relationship with the HR executives (CHRO, Chief Learning Officer & Digital Learning Manager) of our clients to develop the usage, adoption & impact of our solution. 
 
Given the complexity of Enterprise clients, you will act as a true facilitator to ensure the renewal of the clients by :
 
- coordinating the different 360Learning resources (technical, pedagogical,...)
- empowering the client with the Enterprise positioning and vision provided by our solution 
 
Ultimately, you will ensure the renewal or signing of new contracts for accounts listed in your portfolio.

source_jobs.title: Customer Success Partner, Enterprise
source_jobs.description:
Introduction to the Team & Role
As a Customer Success Partner, you will partner with our clients to achieve their digital training strategy through the 360Learning platform. The relationship you create with your customers will allow you to map your customer’s key business objectives, audit and analyze platform usage to identify opportunities, review benchmarks and best practices, create action plans to capitalize on those opportunities. You will ensure the renewal of contracts by helping our customers achieve their desired outcomes, which in many cases includes coordinating different resources to address customer requirements (technical, educational, etc.). This is a high profile role within our growing company, as you are responsible for the development and goal attainment of our clients!
“At 360Learning, our Enterprise Customer Success team is a key strategic differentiator. Our Enterprise Customer Success Partners (CSPs) help large organizations accelerate upskilling by delivering measurable business impact and long-term value at scale. Customers can expect strategic partnership, strong execution, and outcome-focused guidance that transforms L&D into business results across the enterprise.”
— Paul Escobedo, Sr Director, Customer Success

source_jobs.description:

This is a high profile role within our growing company, as you are responsible for the development and goal attainment of our clients!
“Our Mid-Market Customer Success team plays a critical role in ensuring customers realize the full value of our platform. This happens through ongoing conversations about driving adoption, aligning solutions to business goals, and proactively supporting long-term success. Through strategic partnership and ongoing engagement, our CSPs help customers maximize business outcomes, uncover new opportunities, and achieve measurable impact.”
— Shae Phelps Pedan, Manager, Customer Success, Mid Market

source_jobs.description:
We are looking for an Account Executive who is curious, passionate, who thrives in an international team and is willing to roll-up their sleeves to get things done.
 
As an Account Executive, you will be responsible for driving revenue on German speaking markets, with a focus on the mid-market segment. You are committed to learning and perfectly executing our proven sales methodologies to hit your quota and to actively contribute to the German growth strategy and sales effort. 
 
The position involves leading opportunities from demo to closing, taking an active part in our responses to requests for proposals, growing your network with HR & training decision-makers, and developing the best sales strategies to close deals.

source_jobs.title: Key Account Manager Mid Market
source_jobs.description:
As a Key Account Manager (KAM), you play a decisive role in the growth of 360Learning's business and you will join a team of 5 KAMs (Mid-market).You will be in charge of around 100 accounts (existing customers from 100 to 2,500 employees).
 
At 360Learning, the KAM role is 80% sales oriented and your goal is to develop your portfolio and generate growth. But, you will not work alone! Client Success Partners and internal experts (digital pedagogy, platform structuring, IT) are in charge of the client’s project monitoring and execution. Collaborating with these teams will be instrumental to succeed in your upsell actions. 
 
We are eager to retain the best talent in our teams, and we will encourage internal moves after 2-3 years of continuous success to build together fulfilling career paths. This KAM Mid-role offers the possibility of moving to a KAM Large position (existing customers from 2,500 to 10,000+ employees).

source_jobs.title: Key Account Manager Mid-Market - Pool
source_jobs.description:
As a Key Account Manager Pool (KAM Pool), you play a strategic role in scaling 360Learning’s customer growth and retention engine. You will join a team focused on maximizing renewal and upsell opportunities across a large portfolio of existing customers through automation, data-driven prioritization, and scalable account management strategies.
You will manage a high-volume portfolio of customers ranging from 100 to 2,500 employees, with a focus on identifying growth opportunities, driving renewals, and increasing customer engagement at scale through automatization actions. 
At 360Learning, the KAM Pool role is a unique opportunity to also shape the overall KAM team. It combines account management, revenue generation, and operational excellence. Your mission is to build scalable motions that accelerate expansion opportunities while ensuring customers continue to realize value from the platform. Therefore, your successful automatization processes will also help shape globally the entire KAM team. 
As a transversal role, you will work closely with Client Success Partners, Revenue Operations, Marketing, and internal experts (digital pedagogy, platform structuring, IT) to deploy automated engagement strategies, optimize renewal processes, and generate upsell opportunities efficiently across your portfolio.
We are eager to retain the best talent in our teams, and we encourage internal mobility after 2–3 years of continuous success to build fulfilling career paths. This role offers strong growth opportunities toward strategic account management, revenue operations, or large account ownership positions.

source_jobs.title: Lead AI Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Introduction to the Team & Role

AI is central to 360Learning's strategy: our AI Squad ships agentic features that help users discover, create, and administrate content.

Over the last year, we have shipped 5+ AI features powering thousands of users monthly:

  • Catalog Companion: An AI agent performing bulk catalog operations (sharing, archiving, tagging, author assignments)

  • Smart Search: conversational search helping users discover the right content

  • Conversational BI: Analytics and insights delivered through natural conversation

  • AI Course & Question Generation: Creating questions and full courses from documents and titles

  • Content Recommendations: Personalized content discovery

We're now looking for a Lead AI Engineer to drive the technical vision for AI in 360Learning’s product and to coach our AI Engineers as the team grows. This is a hands-on leadership role: you'll set technical direction, own the hardest architectural decisions, and grow the people around you, while staying close to the code.

You'll coach our team of AI Engineers (2 today, growing), and partner closely with 1 Product Manager, 1 Product Designer, and our Full-Stack Developers. You'll report directly to the Head of AI/Data.

source_jobs.title: Presales Engineer DACH
source_jobs.description:
As a Presales Engineer, you will be working at the intersection of Sales, Product and Customer Success, working with top learning and development organizations to align their growth objectives to 360learning capabilities. As the first Presales Engineer for the German market, you will play a crucial role in ensuring the region’s success, but you will have the support from the whole EMEA team. 
 
This role will be foundational to 360learning business expansion. Reinforcing a new function in Germany, as a Presales Engineer, you will become an internal expert in our technology, developing a deep understanding of how 360learning is being used by current customers and how it can drive value for future ones. You will bridge the gap between the strategic direction of our product development and the needs of our market.

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
At the start of 360Learning's growth, we were only 10 developers in the R&D department working on a single codebase. Today, we are a team of 60+ engineers divided into 10 product squads. Each squad includes developers, product managers and designers. Our technical teams are paramount to 360Learning’s response to our increasingly demanding customers and are strategic players for the growth of the company. We have the opportunity to: 
 
Lead real and complex technical challenges: A complex codebase on which analysis and modeling capabilities are key. Significant traffic (2.3M registered users, 200K unique monthly visitors) with a considerable volume of data to manage. A strong focus on “clean architecture” for long-term growth.
 
Work on an attractive technical stack: We work on MongoDB, Node.js and Vue.js, three of the most popular JS technologies on the market. We are currently migrating to TypeScript.
 
Grow within a R&D team that allows rapid progress: Our decentralized peer review process provides us with qualitative and regular feedback from other team members. We promote pair programming and knowledge sharing.

source_jobs.title: Solution Deployment Manager
source_jobs.description:
As our Solution Deployment Manager, you are part of our Implementation team, which plays a key role in onboarding seamlessly new customers: they are working cross department (Sales, Product and Customer Success) to understand and document client use cases and requirements and then translate them into set up and configuration of the 360Learning platform. 
 
You will manage all phases of the implementation lifecycle, from sales turnover and kick off to handover to support. You will drive project management, define 360Learning platform architecture for our clients, facilitate integrations (flat files, API’s) and 3rd party apps, guide and provide assistance in order to ensure the successful deployment of their platform.
 
In addition, you will follow your customers' portfolio along their contract to increase product adoption, as well as to deliver Solutions complementary to the Product like platform audits.

source_jobs.title: Solution Expert
source_jobs.description:
Our Solution Expert team plays a key role in supporting strategic customers in RUN phase, by acting as trusted advisors on complex use cases. Working closely with Sales, Product, and Customer Success, they analyze advanced client needs, challenge existing setups, and translate requirements into scalable solutions within the 360Learning platform. 
 
You will manage a portfolio of customers throughout their lifecycle to drive product adoption and deliver tailored solutions beyond standard product capabilities. 
 
These large and strategic accounts have already deployed the platform and have a strong level of autonomy. They rely on your technical and functional expertise to lead complex integrations (APIs, flat files, third-party tools), redesign platform architecture, run solution audits, and provide high-level recommendations to maximize business impact and long-term value.

You will bridge the gap between the strategic direction of our product development and the needs of our market.

source_jobs.title: Spontaneous Application
source_jobs.description:
We believe there is only one long-term solution to enable humanity to meet major societal challenges, including unemployment, hunger, disease, the environment, political and religious extremism or even space exploration. This solution is education. 360Learning has become the fastest growing EdTech (Education Technology) scale-up in Europe by disrupting the Corporate Learning market since 2013. We are now 100+ employees in New York, Paris & London, supporting 1,200+ customers in 160 countries, such as Dior, Criteo, Safran, Michelin, BNP, Axa & Devialet.

Our mission is to help companies become Learning Organizations, by connecting their Leaders with their Learners. With our Learning Engagement Platform, they:
- empower internal Business Experts, transforming them into active Leaders who create courses and train the others;
- connect Leaders with Learners in a highly engaging, user-friendly, modern web interface where they interact and exchange knowledge (resulting in 90% participation rate vs. 45% on average);
- scale fast & effective trainings to the full organization (in a few hours vs. several months), integrating 360Learning seamlessly with other tools such as HRIS and CRM;
- optimize courses by leveraging user data to make Smart Recommendations.

360Learning is building a team composed of 100% top performers and a culture of well-being and collective performance.

Our goal is to become the top global provider of educational software solutions. 

Our workplace 
- Unique decentralized culture: https://360learning.com/legal/convexity-guidelines/
- Complete ownership of your role
- Flexible hours

source_jobs.title: Tech Talent Acquisition Manager
source_jobs.description:
Introduction to the Team & Role
As our Tech Talent Acquisition Manager, you will play a key role in shaping the future of 360Learning by driving the growth of our tech organization. You will be responsible for identifying, engaging, and hiring top-tier talent across a wide range of roles, including Software Engineers, Software Architects, Devops Engineers,  Product Managers, Product Designers, and Data Engineers... Beyond execution, you will act as a strategic partner to hiring managers, helping define hiring needs, refine role scopes, and elevate our overall talent strategy.
You will leverage a variety of sourcing approaches—proactive outreach, talent mapping, employer branding initiatives, and data-driven recruitment strategies—to attract high-quality candidates in competitive markets. You will also ensure an exceptional candidate experience from the first touchpoint to the offer stage, acting as a true ambassador of our culture and values.
You will join a team of multiple Talent Acquisition professionals, working closely together while being geographically distributed across France and the US.
While your home base will be our Paris office, the role is fully flexible and can be performed remotely from anywhere in France.

notes: High volume of sales and business development roles, with some tech roles. No explicit mention of sponsorship or clearance requirements.
